changeSet.author: hisab-erp
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO permissions (id, code, resource, action, description) VALUES (uuid_generate_v4(), 'customer:delete', 'customer', 'delete', 'Deactivate a customer / partner customer role'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'supplier:create', 'supplier', 'create', 'Create a supplier or partner supplier role'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'supplier:update', 'supplier', 'update', 'Update a supplier'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'supplier:delete', 'supplier', 'delete', 'Deactivate a supplier / partner supplier role'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'sales:create', 'sales', 'create', 'Create quotes, orders, invoices, credit notes'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'sales:update', 'sales', 'update', 'Update quote/order status'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'expense:update', 'expense', 'update', 'Update expense or expense category'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'expense:delete', 'expense', 'delete', 'Delete or deactivate expense category'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'payment:update', 'payment', 'update', 'Confirm or allocate a payment'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'delivery:create', 'delivery', 'create', 'Create a delivery'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'delivery:update', 'delivery', 'update', 'Update or cancel a delivery'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'purchase:create', 'purchase', 'create', 'Create purchase orders or purchase invoices'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'purchase:update', 'purchase', 'update', 'Confirm, cancel, or update purchase docs'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'lot:create', 'lot', 'create', 'Create a lot or lot alert config'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'lot:update', 'lot', 'update', 'Block or update a lot / alert config'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'lot:delete', 'lot', 'delete', 'Destroy a lot') ON CONFLICT (code) DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: hisab-erp
hisab-erp
